top_findings.summary: The skill requests Bash, Glob, and Grep permissions which are excessive for a configuration file loader. While Read, Write, and Edit permissions are justified for reading/parsing configuration files, Bash access (allowing arbitrary command execution), Glob (file pattern matching), and Grep (text pattern searching) go beyond the stated purpose of simply loading/saving YAML/JSON/TOML files. These additional permissions could enable scanning directories, searching through unrelated files, or executing arbitrary system commands - none of which are necessary for basic configuration file operations.
